Endoscopic view showing ligating loop placement around simulated appendage with clear visualization of loop cinching

task_specific_assessments.video_type: Educational/Instructional demonstration with multiple expert instructors
task_specific_assessments.performance_component: None - no actual trainee task performance visible

confidence_rationale: Video is clearly educational/instructional in nature with expert narration, multiple instructors, cadaver/foam models, and teaching dialogue. No actual task performance by a trainee is present to score.

demonstrated_techniques: Loop positioning at base of appendage
verbal_cues: Expert physicians explain proper loop placement in relation to appendage anatomy
Discussion of safety margins to avoid appendage transection
Emphasis on complete cinching before tail cutting
Explanation of tissue handling during loop deployment
common_errors_addressed: Inadequate loop positioning away from target organ
Premature cutting of tail before secure cinching
Tissue grasping errors during loop advancement

overall_assessment: This is a professional educational video featuring endoloop technique instruction by attending surgeons at academic medical centers (Case Western Reserve University, Lurie Children's Hospital of Chicago, Northwestern University). The video contains expert-level instruction, anatomical models, laparoscopic footage examples, and verbal explanation of best practices. No trainee performance is present to score according to FLS rubric. Content is appropriate for instructional/teaching purposes only.
recommendation: Do not score as FLS performance. Use as teaching resource for endoloop technique training.
